It's unmanned 24 hours a day, so it's really convenient to go anytime, whether it's early in the morning or working overtime. I was surprised that the americano made by Baris was much better than I thought, and the fact that it tastes the same every time is an advantage! It goes well with the atmosphere of the stone wall in Euljiro, so the space is quiet and clean, so it's good for working.
